query: SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.totalAmount, oi.productName, oi.quantity, oi.price FROM `orders` o LEFT JOIN `order_items` oi ON o.id = oi.orderId WHERE o.orderNumber = '00039' OR o.id = 39;
